description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: The Lawyer Registry (also "LR") is a registry of specialized Ecosystem Actors who are qualified to perform legal work for Sky Ecosystem or participants in the Sky Ecosystem, including, but not limited to, legal representation or legal defense.
Lawyers will be onboarded in the Lawyer Registry covering at least the areas specified in [A.2.
